'''''Polyhedron'' 170''' is an issue of ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine. It appeared as part of ''Dungeon Magazine 111''. It featured a source article about the first story arc of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Rich Handley]]. The article was called ''[[Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'', and was illustrated by [[Jeffery Carlisle]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
